response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of C++ in recent roles or cloud compute leadership, and no demonstrated experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning cloud architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse technologies
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Demonstrated ability to lead ambiguous projects and build scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, AI-agent tooling)
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below the 8-year minimum
No evidence of cloud compute platform ownership, distributed systems design, or hardware architecture experience
Lacks formal technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering or established engineering best practices at scale
